title: Climbing Stairs
problem_statement: Count the distinct ways to climb n stairs if you can take 1 or 2 steps each time.

approaches.name: Bottom-up DP
approaches.description: Use an array or two variables to build the count of ways iteratively.
approaches.why_not: Recursive solutions without memoization are exponential.

interview_qa.a: ways(n) = ways(n-1) + ways(n-2), because the last step can be 1 or 2.
Only the previous two values are needed, so constant space suffices.
